Class Cat

java.lang.Object
shelter.domain.Animal
shelter.domain.Cat
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Animal>
public class Cat extends Animal
Represents a cat available for adoption at a shelter. In addition to the base Animal attributes, a cat carries an indoor-only flag and a neutered status, which are relevant to lifestyle matching and medical records.

  • Constructor Details

    • Cat

      public Cat(String id, String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, boolean vaccinated, String adopterId, String shelterId, boolean indoor, boolean neutered)
      Reconstruction constructor for deserializing a Cat from persistent storage. This constructor preserves the original id and all fields including the indoor flag and neutered status, allowing exact round-trip restore from CSV data.
      Parameters:
      id - the pre-existing unique identifier; must not be null or blank
      name - the cat's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the cat's breed; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the cat's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the cat's activity level; must not be null
      vaccinated - whether the cat has been vaccinated
      adopterId - the ID of the adopter, or null if not adopted
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter, or null if unassigned
      indoor - whether the cat is suited for indoor-only living
      neutered - whether the cat has been neutered
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any Animal parameter is invalid

    • Cat

      public Cat(String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, boolean vaccinated, boolean indoor, boolean neutered)
      Constructs a new Cat with the given attributes. All parameters are validated at construction time per Animal rules.
      Parameters:
      name - the cat's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the cat's breed; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the cat's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the cat's activity level; must not be null
      vaccinated - whether the cat has been vaccinated
      indoor - whether the cat is suited for indoor-only living
      neutered - whether the cat has been neutered
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any Animal parameter is invalid

    • Cat

      public Cat(Cat other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new Cat with all field values copied from other. Inherits base Animal fields via Animal(Animal) and copies Cat-specific fields.
      Parameters:
      other - the Cat instance to copy; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getSpecies

      public Species getSpecies()
      Returns the species of this animal. Each concrete subclass must return its own immutable Species constant.
      Specified by:
      getSpecies in class Animal
      Returns:
      the Species of this animal

    • isIndoor

      public boolean isIndoor()
      Returns whether this cat is an indoor-only cat. Indoor cats are generally better suited for apartment or enclosed-space living.
      Returns:
      true if the cat prefers indoor living, false otherwise

    • isNeutered

      public boolean isNeutered()
      Returns whether this cat has been neutered.
      Returns:
      true if the cat is neutered, false otherwise

    • setNeutered

      public void setNeutered(boolean neutered)
      Updates the neutered status of this cat. Typically called when shelter medical records are updated after a procedure.
      Parameters:
      neutered - the new neutered status
